title: pelargonium × savonitianum
intro: Pelargonium × savonitianum, commonly known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Geranium family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium tomentosum. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and stress-related ailments, due to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool compounds. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote a restful sleep, while also acting as an antibacterial and antifungal agent. Rose Geranium can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, essential oils, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
